claimText: The RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme covers Urban Cooperative Banks with deposits of 50 crore and NBFCs with assets of 100 crore.
evidenceExcerpt: Covers UCBs with deposits of 50 crore and NBFCs with assets of 100 crore.
examUse: Statement-based question on the eligibility criteria for entities covered under the Ombudsman Scheme.
distractorHooks: Different deposit or asset thresholds such as UCBs with 100 crore deposits
Exclusion of NBFCs or UCBs from the scheme

claimText: The RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme integrates the Banking, NBFC, and Digital Transactions Ombudsman schemes under a One Nation One Ombudsman approach.
evidenceExcerpt: Integrates Banking (2006), NBFC (2018), and Digital Transactions (2019) Ombudsman schemes.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying which previous schemes were merged into the Integrated Ombudsman Scheme.
distractorHooks: Inclusion of SEBI or Securities Ombudsman

claimText: Under the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, the Ombudsman can award compensation up to 20 lakh and an additional 1 lakh for mental distress.
evidenceExcerpt: Ombudsman can award up to 20 lakh in compensation and 1 lakh for mental distress.
examUse: Factual statement in a multiple-choice question regarding the maximum compensation limits of the Ombudsman.
distractorHooks: Compensation limit of 10 lakh or 50 lakh
No provision for mental distress compensation
